positive: A highly detailed, stylized celestial woodland scene. A central, majestic crescent moon is flanked by stylized blooming lunar lilies and gently flowing, iridescent nebula streams. Incorporate abstract constellations made of fine, etched lines and vibrant, contrasting color gradients (deep sapphire blue, muted gold, ethereal silver). The composition must be symmetrical and perfectly centered, forming a clean silhouette against a deep, midnight background. Intricate filigree work and geometric botanical elements. Style: Clean line art, graphic design illustration, mid-century modern celestial etching, suitable for apparel print, high contrast, ultra-detailed, vector quality.
